generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former FEMA emergency response coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital civil defense preparedness is for national security. While some worry about costs or liberties, the real threat is being unprepared. We can't afford to wait until disaster strikes - basic readiness saves lives and reduces long-term burdens. Trust the experts who've been in the trenches during crises. #CivilDefenseMatters
